headline: 3 Steady Stocks with 3% Yields and Growing Profits
summary: AT&T, Darden Restaurants, and Philip Morris International offer reliable dividends above 3% and steady earnings growth in a volatile market.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Public Service Enterprise Group’s Valuation After Recent Price Softness
summary: If you are wondering whether Public Service Enterprise Group's current share price still offers value or if most of the opportunity is already priced in, this article breaks down what the numbers are really saying. The stock closed at US$81.26, with returns of 0.3% over the last week, a 2.9% decline over the last month, and 0.3% over both the year to date and the past year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns are 40.9% and 51.2% respectively. Recent price moves come against a backdrop of...
